entry.title: New: RES24-189 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT $3,500, TO THE CITY FROM THE HONOLULU FESTIVAL FOUNDATION FOR THE DIRECTOR OF ENTERPRISE SERVICES TO ATTEND THE HONOLULU FESTIVAL FOUNDATION GOODWILL MISSION TOUR OF FUKUOKA, HIROSHIMA, AND TOKYO, JAPAN, FROM JULY 24-29, 2024.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
